N

NAME - Static variable in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivity
 
navigatedToAllEntrantsActivityTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AllEntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if activity shows entrants when the Activity is navigated to
navigateToAllEntrantsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if the navigation to view entrants is correct and displays the correct entrants
navigateToChosenEntrantsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EntrantsActivityTest
Test to see if the navigation to view entrants of a specific status (chosen) is correct and displays the correct entrants do not need to test other statuses as they are implemented together
NavigateToCreateEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HostedEventsActivityTest
Test if navigation to CreateEventActivity is correct
NavigateToEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HostedEventsActivityTest
Test if navigation to ViewEventActivity is correct event and allows edits
NavigateToEvent() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.MyWaitlistActivityTest
Test if navigation to ViewEventActivity is correct event and is in the view version
NavigateToMyThingsTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.HomeActivityTest
Test to navigation to MyThings activity is correct with the correct user information
NotificationAdapter - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Adapter for displaying a list of NotificationItem objects in a RecyclerView.
NotificationAdapter(List<NotificationItem>, NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter
Constructs a new NotificationAdapter with the provided list of notifications and click listener
NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
ViewHolder class for individual notification list items
NotificationAdapter.OnNotificationClickListener - Interface in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Interface for handling click and long-click events on notification items.
NotificationAdapterCountTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Local unit tests for the NotificationAdapter class.
NotificationAdapterCountTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapterCountTest
 
NotificationItem - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Model class representing a notification item in the system Notifications can be related to winning a lottery ("WIN") or general event updates ("GENERAL")
NotificationItem() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItem
Default constructor required for Firestore
NotificationItem(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItem
Constructs a new NotificationItem with the specified details Initial status is set to "PENDING" and timestamp to current time
NotificationItemTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Local unit tests for the NotificationItem data model.
NotificationItemTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationItemTest
 
NotificationRepository - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Repository class for managing notifications in Firestore.
NotificationRepository() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Initializes the NotificationRepository with a Firestore instance.
NotificationRepositoryTest - Class in com.example.eventlotterysystem
Unit tests for NotificationRepository.
NotificationRepositoryTest() - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepositoryTest
 
NotificationViewHolder(View) - Constructor for class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationAdapter.NotificationViewHolder
Initializes the ViewHolder by finding the relevant views in the item layout
